task_updates.executor_notes: Added deterministic Sprint 2b coverage: body search edge cases for empty queries, negative context windows, and tilde-fenced headings; SQLite hot-context ordering/limit behavior for unresolved observations; ledger/system-prompt snapshot coverage with active feedback; and optional LLM-eval fixture scaffolding gated by the llm_eval marker plus ARNOLD_RUN_LLM_EVALS. Targeted verification passed with the optional eval skipped by default. Full python -m pytest still fails only on the known historical secret-scan failure.
commands_run: python -m pytest tests/test_body_parser.py tests/test_sqlite_store.py tests/test_ledger.py tests/test_sprint2b_llm_eval_scaffolding.py tests/test_run_turn.py tests/test_editorial_polish_loop.py

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: Yes. Deterministic tests now cover core Sprint 2b parser/search, store/hot-context, model prompt, and scripted integration acceptance criteria. Optional LLM-eval fixtures are present, shape-checked offline, marked llm_eval, and skipped unless ARNOLD_RUN_LLM_EVALS=1.

deviations: Full python -m pytest still fails only in tests/test_no_leaked_secrets.py::test_leaked_supabase_service_role_jwt_prefix_is_absent due to historical .megaplan/plans/sprint-1b-discord-resident/* files containing a Supabase JWT prefix; this matches prior batch deviations.
